subject: Exclusive Upgrade Offer Just for You, Tom!
body:
Dear Tom Bridgewater,

As a valued member of our premium segment for over 7 years, we appreciate your loyalty and want to enhance your experience with an exciting upgrade opportunity!

We noticed that you’re currently enjoying your iPhone 14 on your plan. To complement your device and support your active lifestyle, we’re thrilled to offer you the Apple Watch S9 for just £22 a month.

With advanced health and fitness tracking, ECG and blood oxygen monitoring, and features like Crash Detection and Emergency SOS, the Apple Watch S9 is designed to help you stay on top of your health and safety — it’s the smartwatch that could save your life.

Don’t miss out on this exclusive offer tailored just for you! Click the link below to upgrade your experience today:

[Upgrade Now]

Best regards,
Your Telco Team
